title: MoreCraftables
description: Adds new crafting recipes that I think should be in the vanilla game
body:
### MoreCraftables
This mod adds crafting recipes for:

- Elytra
- Trident
- Enchanted golden apple
- Horse armor (all types)
- Chainmail armor
- Bell
- Saddle
- Cobweb
- String (from wool)

**Elytra Core:**
To craft the elytra you need to first make an elytra core (recipe in gallery)

**Note:** It is recommended you use this mode with JEI (Just Enough Items)
